config.script:
class CDHMEditorConfig public m_bFiltrujZerowe public m_bFiltrujUjemne
public sub class_initialize() m_bFiltrujZerowe = false m_bFiltrujUjemne = false end sub
public function generuj(curIlosc) if m_bFiltrujZerowe and m_bFiltrujUjemne then generuj = (curIlosc > 0) else if not m_bFiltrujZerowe and not m_bFiltrujUjemne then generuj = true else if m_bFiltrujZerowe then generuj = (curIlosc <> 0) else generuj = (curIlosc >= 0) end if end if end if
end function
end class
function create_dmh_editor_config() set create_dmh_editor_config = new CDHMEditorConfig end function
dim g_dhm dim g_cfg
function edit_dhm_balance ( byref dhm_balance , byval cfg) page_.result = false set g_dhm = dhm_balance set g_cfg = cfg fill_table_internal edit_dhm_balance = page_.domodalauto() end function
private function fill_table_internal dim tb set tb = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TABLE_RESULTS)).section_head.removeall
'nagłówek tb.newrow tb.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER
tb.newcell.addtext "Indeks i nazwa produktu" tb.cell.colspan = clng(2)
'tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 'tb.element.text "Stan magazynu (plik)" 'tb.cell.width = clng(2500)
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 tb.element.text = "Ilość zamówiona" tb.cell.width = clng(2500)
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 tb.element.text = "Stan magazynu produkcyjnego" tb.cell.width = clng(2500)
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 tb.element.text = "Stan magazynu wyroby gotowe" tb.cell.width = clng(2500)
tb.newcell.addtext "Ilość"
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX , -1 tb.element.text = "Limit" tb.cell.width = clng(1500)
tb.section_body
dim iter dim prod,dhm_item for iter = 0 to g_dhm.get_count() - 1 set dhm_item = g_dhm.get_pos(iter) gererate_row tb , dhm_item , g_cfg , iter next
end function
private function gererate_row (byref tb , byval dhm_item , byval cfg , byval iter)
dim bGeneruj:bGeneruj = true if not cfg is nothing then bGeneruj = cfg.generuj (dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_ZAM)) end if
if bGeneruj then
dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) = dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_ZAM) - dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_STAN_MAG_PROD) if dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) < ccur(0) then dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) = ccur(0) end if
tb.newrow.newcell.addtext dhm_item.m_strProdInx if dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) < ccur(0) then tb.element.strike = true else tb.element.bold = true end if
tb.newcell.addtext dhm_item.m_strProdNazwa if dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) = ccur(0) then tb.element.strike = true else tb.element.bold = true end if
'tb.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_MAG) , dhm_item.m_strUnit , dhm_item.m_nPrecision ) 'if dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_MAG) < ccur(0) then ' tb.element.forecolor = rgb(255,0,0) 'elseif dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_MAG) > ccur(0) then ' if dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) > ccur(0) then ' tb.element.bold=true ' end if 'end if
tb.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_ZAM) , dhm_item.m_strUnit , dhm_item.m_nPrecision )
tb.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_STAN_MAG_PROD) , dhm_item.m_strUnit , dhm_item.m_nPrecision )
tb.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_DOSTEPNOSC) , dhm_item.m_strUnit , dhm_item.m_nPrecision )
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CURRENCY , -1 with tb.element .size=13 .unit = dhm_item.m_strUnit .precision = dhm_item.m_nPrecision .value = ccur(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM))
set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(100) = clng(iter) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
tb.newcell.addtext trans_.afc.display.quantity(dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_MAXSTAN) , dhm_item.m_strUnit , dhm_item.m_nPrecision )
end if
end function
function c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ongetdata(pCtrl):c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ondataentered(pCtrl, varValue):c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ondataentered = true dim iter : iter = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(100)) dim dhm_item:set dhm_item = g_dhm.get_pos(iter) dhm_item.m_curValue(SPRZ_COLNR_CUSTOM) = varValue ' dim nIter2 : nIter2 = clng(pCtrl.userprop.prop(101)) ' ' c##CTRLID_ALLOC_QTY##_ondataentered = g_pRRAT.allocate_qty_detail_value(nIter,nIter2,varValue) end function
function fok page_.result = true page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.result = false page_.goback end function
